services.name: Esplanade Charles de Gaulle
services.notes: Large tree-lined promenade, dogs on leash, central meeting spot

services.name: Keep Cool Montpellier Centre
services.notes: Affordable gym, no commitment options, cardio and weights

services.name: Anglican Church of Montpellier
services.notes: English-language services, small but welcoming expat congregation

attractions.name: Musée Fabre
attractions.description: One of France's leading fine arts museums with Impressionist and modern collections

attractions.name: Place de la Comédie
attractions.description: Grand central square, one of the largest pedestrian areas in Europe, 18th-century architecture

attractions.name: Promenade du Peyrou
attractions.description: Royal promenade with triumphal arch, water tower, and panoramic views to the Pyrenees

attractions.name: Plage de Palavas-les-Flots
attractions.description: Mediterranean beach resort 15 min from city by tram, sandy beaches

attractions.name: Halles Castellane
attractions.description: Covered market with fresh local produce, cheese, wine, and prepared foods

attractions.name: Opéra Comédie
attractions.description: 19th-century opera house with regular performances of opera, ballet, and concerts

attractions.name: Pic Saint-Loup
attractions.description: Iconic limestone peak north of Montpellier, hiking and renowned wine region

attractions.name: Place Jean Jaurès
attractions.description: Trendy square with terraces, restaurants, and nightlife hub in the Ecusson

attractions.name: Cathédrale Saint-Pierre
attractions.description: Imposing 14th-century Gothic cathedral in the heart of the old town

attractions.name: Stade de la Mosson
attractions.description: Home of Montpellier HSC football club, Ligue 1 matches
